description: Dealer Gamma Exposure & Positioning Engine. Models market-maker options inventory across SPY/QQQ/IWM + 7 single names. Computes per-strike GEX, zero-gamma flip level, vanna/charm exposure, max pain, IV skew, 0DTE concentration, P/C ratios. Outputs regime classification + squeeze candidates.

schedule.description: Hourly :07 during US market hours (9:07 AM - 5:07 PM ET) Mon-Fri — gamma matters most when market is open
